rule_metadata.name: Android_MazarBot
rule_metadata.author: Jacob Soo Lead Re
rule_metadata.description: This rule try to detects MazarBot

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule Android_MazarBot
{
	meta:
		author = "Jacob Soo Lead Re"
		date = "01-July-2016"
		description = "This rule try to detects MazarBot"
		source = "https://heimdalsecurity.com/blog/security-alert-new-android-malware-post-denmark/"

	condition:
		(androguard.filter ( /wakeup/i ) and androguard.filter ( /reportsent/i ) ) or ( androguard.filter ( /wakeup/i ) and androguard.filter ( /com\.whats\.process/i ) )
}
